title: The Adventure of Goodness
kidLesson: Choosing the right path is a big adventure!

title: Do your best, forget the rest
kidLesson: Focus on the fun of doing, not just winning the prize.
bigIdea: Do your best, forget the rest

title: Be a Hero!
kidLesson: When you do good things, others will follow your lead.

title: You're never alone
kidLesson: God always comes to help when things get tricky.
sanskrit: यदा यदा हि धर्मस्य ग्लानिर्भवति भारत ।

title: See the Magic in Everyone
kidLesson: Everyone and everything has a spark of goodness inside.

title: Be Your Own Best Friend
kidLesson: You have the power to make yourself happy and strong!

title: The Magic String
kidLesson: All living things are connected, like beads on a beautiful string.

title: Keep a Happy Heart
kidLesson: Remember to be kind while you play, study, and grow.

title: Small Gifts, Big Love
kidLesson: A simple leaf, flower, or fruit given with a smile is a great gift.
sanskrit: पत्रं पुष्पं फलं तोयं यो मे भक्त्या प्रयच्छति ।

title: Spot the Sparkle
kidLesson: Wherever you see something beautiful, that's God's magic at work.

title: You are a Special Tool
kidLesson: You are like a magical instrument in God's hands.
sanskrit: तस्मात्त्वमुत्तिष्ठ यशो लभस्व... निमित्तमात्रं भव सव्यसाचिन् ।

title: Be a Friend to All
kidLesson: Be kind to every person, animal, and plant you meet.
sanskrit: अद्वेष्टा सर्वभूतानां मैत्रः करुण एव च ।

title: Seeing with Your Heart
kidLesson: True magic is seeing that God lives in everyone’s heart.

title: Kindness is Smart
kidLesson: Being good and kind actually helps your brain grow wiser!
sanskrit: सत्त्वात्सञ्जायते ज्ञानं रजसो लोभ एव च ।

title: You have Magic Inside
kidLesson: You are a small spark of the Divine. You are amazing!

title: Your Superpowers
kidLesson: Courage, honesty, and kindness are your real superpowers.

title: You are what you Believe
kidLesson: Your happy thoughts and faith make you who you are.

title: The Victory Secret
kidLesson: When you use your heart and your head together, you always win!
sanskrit: यत्र योगेश्वरः कृष्णो यत्र पार्थो धनुर्धरः ।
